_note: SAMPLE / DEMO DATA — networking and mentorship resources. Verify each program directly; availability changes.

general.name: American Corporate Partners (ACP)
general.what: Free year-long 1-on-1 mentorship with a corporate mentor.

general.name: Veterati
general.what: Free on-demand phone mentorship — book vets and hiring managers by industry.

general.name: LinkedIn for Veterans
general.what: Free LinkedIn Premium Career year + veteran community programs.

general.name: RallyPoint
general.what: Military & veteran professional network for peer connections.

general.name: Local VSO posts (VFW / American Legion / DAV)
general.what: In-person community, job leads, and benefits help near you.

vaSpecific.name: VA benefits & facility events
vaSpecific.what: Claims clinics, town halls, and benefits fairs at VA facilities.

vaSpecific.name: Vet Centers
vaSpecific.what: Community counseling + peer connection, separate from VA hospitals.

vaSpecific.name: County veteran service officers
vaSpecific.what: Your free local benefits navigator — and a networking node.

employment.name: FourBlock
employment.what: Free career-readiness course inside partner companies.

employment.name: DOL VETS / American Job Centers
employment.what: Your assigned veteran employment rep — use them.

education.name: Student Veterans of America (SVA)
education.what: Campus chapters — instant community + advocacy at school.

education.name: School veteran services office
education.what: Certifying officials + vet-specific aid and priority registration.

education.name: Warrior-Scholar Project
education.what: Academic boot camps easing the jump to college rigor.

trades.name: Helmets to Hardhats
trades.what: Direct placement into registered building-trade apprenticeships.

trades.name: Union locals (IBEW, UA, Ironworkers)
trades.what: Apprenticeship intake + brotherhood that mirrors unit culture.

trades.name: VFW/Legion halls in trade towns
trades.what: Where the local hiring actually happens — show up.

entrepreneur.name: Veterans Business Outreach Center (VBOC)
entrepreneur.what: Free SBA-funded business coaching for veterans.

entrepreneur.name: Bunker Labs
entrepreneur.what: Veteran founder community, cohorts, and city chapters.

entrepreneur.name: SCORE mentors
entrepreneur.what: Free experienced business mentors, many veteran-friendly.

women.name: V-WISE (IVMF)
women.what: Entrepreneurship training for women veterans & spouses.

minority.name: MBDA Business Centers
minority.what: Growth help for minority-owned businesses — stacks with veteran status.
